title: helianthemum mutabile
intro: Helianthemum mutabile, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species in the Cistaceae family, native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum mutabile include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for various digestive issues. Helianthemum mutabile can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
